job_description:
About the Role

We are seeking a high-energy, articulate individual to serve as a bridge between our market and sales leadership. This entry-level position is ideal for a fresher aiming to develop expertise in sales and communication within a professional setting.

Key Responsibilities - Cold Calling Support: Initiate phone conversations with potential leads to introduce services and assess interest. - Cold Email Outreach: Create and send personalized, professional emails to prospective clients using outreach systems. - Lead Qualification: Filter leads for the BDM based on criteria to prioritize high-value prospects for the sales team. - Multi-Channel Chat Support: Address customer inquiries via website chat, LinkedIn, or WhatsApp to provide instant support and capture interest. - CRM Management: Maintain the lead database with call notes, email responses, and follow-up tasks.

What We’re Looking For - Education: Any degree or post-graduation. - Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills. - Proficiency in basic tools like Excel/Google Sheets, LinkedIn, and chat applications. - Availability to work in shifts aligned with our target market.

Contact: Submit your updated resume to anchana@thoughtminds.io.
summary: High-energy entry-level role supporting sales through cold outreach, CRM management, and multi-channel communication. Ideal for mastering sales and communication in a professional environment.

job_description:
Odoo Developer

At Infintor, we are seeking Odoo Developers to join our dynamic team in Kochi. If you are passionate about software development and customization, we invite you to be a part of our innovative company.

Working Environment:

Infintor predominantly delivers the standard Odoo solution to our diverse clientele. However, some clients require tailored enhancements and customization, ranging from simple button additions to more extensive projects. As a Technical Consultant, your role will involve the end-to-end process of customizing the solution, starting from technical analysis, development, and ongoing support.

Requirements:

  • Programming Languages: Proficiency in Python & JavaScript.
  • Database: Familiarity with PostgreSQL, including object relational mapping.
  • Collaboration Platform: Experience with GitHub.
  • Development Model: Familiarity with the open-source approach, collaborating with an external community.
  • Framework: Proficiency in Odoo, including ORM, Workflows, Report Engine, BI, and AI.

Responsibilities:

  • Developing customized solutions for clients spanning various industries, sectors, and company sizes.
  • Providing ongoing support and maintenance for these tailored solutions.
  • Adapting our SaaS offerings to meet client requirements.
  • Assisting in training and supporting our partner network.

Must-Have Qualifications:

  • Proficiency in several programming languages.
  • Strong grasp of object-oriented programming, object modeling, and relational databases.
  • A genuine passion for software development.
  • The ability to learn and adapt quickly.
  • Fluent in English.
  • A team-oriented mindset.

Nice-to-Have Qualifications:

  • Self-organized work ethic.
  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in a related field.
  • Proficiency in Python, JavaScript, HTML, SQL, and UML-like modeling.
  • Familiarity with Linux platform.

Experience:

2+ Years

If you are a dynamic and motivated Odoo Developer with a passion for customization and development, we encourage you to join our talented team at Infintor. Your expertise will play a crucial role in helping us meet the unique needs of our diverse clientele.

How to Apply:

Click the link below to submit your application: 👉 https://people.infintor.com/jobs/odoo-developer-33

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at odoo-developer@infintor.odoo.com.
summary: Customize Odoo solutions for clients with Python/JavaScript expertise. Requires 2+ years of experience in open-source development and client support.

job_description:
Senior Frontend Developer (Vue 3 – Primary)

Position: Senior Frontend Developer Primary Skill: Vue 3 Experience Required: 3+ years Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead feature development from design → implementation → review → deployment
  • Contribute to system architecture and technical design
  • Maintain and enforce high-quality coding standards
  • Review pull requests and ensure best practices
  • Drive performance and scalability enhancements
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Backend, QA, Product)
  • Mentor junior team members

Technical Skills Required (Frontend – Vue 3 Focus)

  • Core Technologies: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript
  • Vue 3 (mandatory): Composition API, Reactive system, Lifecycle hooks, Component architecture & reusability, State management (Pinia / Vuex), Vue Router (dynamic routing & guards), API integration (Axios / Fetch), Form handling & validation, Performance optimization techniques
  • SPA Architecture: Rendering lifecycle, browser performance bottlenecks, cross-browser compatibility
  • Build Tools: Vite / Webpack, environment configuration & build optimization
  • Unit Testing: Vitest / Jest (preferred)

Full Stack Expectations

  • Ability to consume and integrate REST APIs
  • Understanding of backend workflows
  • Familiarity with databases and deployment basics

Nice to Have

  • Experience in React or Angular (Vue 3 expertise is mandatory)
  • Tailwind CSS knowledge
  • Strong problem-solving and debugging skills
  • Good communication and team collaboration

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume at daya.cloudium@gmail.com
summary: Senior Frontend Developer with Vue 3 expertise leads feature development, mentors teams, and optimizes performance in a full-stack environment.
